BlockerConfig._comment_BlockedDays: Days when Minecraft is blocked. Valid values: Sunday Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday
BlockerConfig._comment_AllowedTimeWindows: Optional: allow Minecraft during these hours even on blocked days. Format: HH:mm:ss. Leave array empty to block all day.
BlockerConfig._comment_TimeZoneId: Windows timezone ID for schedule evaluation. Pinned so changing the machine clock timezone cannot bypass the schedule. Run 'tzutil /l' for valid IDs.
BlockerConfig._comment_FreeDayDailyLimitMinutes: Weekend/free-day play limit in minutes (0 = unlimited). Counter resets at Eastern midnight.
